subject: refactor(quality): comprehensive code quality audit implementation
body:
Extract shared patterns and eliminate duplication across the codebase:

- BaseModal: shared modal wrapper (overlay, focus trap, escape key, backdrop
  click) used by 9 modals, removing ~200 lines of duplicated boilerplate
- ErrorBoundary: React error boundary wrapping GraphCanvas and QueryBuilder
  with retry capability and debug logging
- Centralized error messages (utils/messages.ts) replacing hardcoded strings
  across App.tsx, DetailPanel, ExportModal, ImportModal
- BFS traversal helper (bfsTraverse) in queryEngine.ts consolidating 3
  duplicated BFS loops in expandByHops and findConnections
- QueryBuilder split into SearchModeContent and ConnectModeContent sub-components
  (637 → ~400 lines in main file)
- MergeReview refactored with MergeSection component eliminating 6 duplicated
  collapsible section blocks
- ContextMenu keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down, Enter/Space, Escape, Home/End)
- New tests: safeStorage, eventBus, config, workspaceService (27 new tests)

Tags: refactor, quality, modal, error-boundary, bfs, tests
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality-audit
Semver: minor

title: comprehensive code quality audit implementation
